name: Tropical Island Sherbet
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup firmly packed dark brown sugar
1/2 cup coarsely chopped toasted, blanched almonds
recipeInstructions:
Makes 4 servings
1. Puree the bananas with the yogurt, brown sugar, rum, lime juice, and nutmeg by churning for about 1 minute in a food processor.
2. Spoon into an 8 x 8-inch pan, cover with plastic food wrap, and freeze for 2 to 3 hours until firm around the edges and almost firm in the middle.
3. Churn for 10 seconds in a food processor until fluffy, return to the pan, fold in the almonds, and freeze until firm.
Per Serving: 284 calories, 6g protein, 9.4g fat (1.3g saturated), 45g carbohydrates, 28mg sodium, 1.7mg cholesterol
